raw_source.title: [Remote] SoftGalaxy is Hiring Web3 & Blockchain Developers
raw_source.body:
We are looking for **talented** and **passionate** developers to join the [SoftGalaxy ](https://www.softgalaxy.ro/files/PrezentareSGAprilie2020.pdf)in **Romania** and help build _next-generation blockchain products_.

🔹 **Open Roles:**
• _Web3 Developers_
• _Blockchain Engineers_
• _Solidity Smart Contract Developers_
• _Full-Stack Web3 Developers_

🔹 **Requirements:**
• Strong experience with `blockchain technologies`
• `Solidity` / `Smart Contracts` expertise
• Experience with `Ethereum`, `BNB Chain`, or other `EVM chains`
• Knowledge of `DeFi`, `wallets`, `NFTs`, or `dApps`
• Familiarity with `React`, `Node.js`, `TypeScript`, or `Next.js` is a plus
• Passion for `innovation` and `decentralized technologies`

🔹 **What We Offer:**
• **Remote-friendly** environment
• **Competitive** compensation
• Opportunity to work on **cutting-edge Web3 products**
• **Fast-growing** and **innovative** team culture

If you're passionate about Web3 and want to build impactful blockchain solutions, we’d love to hear from you.

📩 Apply or connect with me with Telegram: @Leonardo2188
raw_source.author: hiring90
